product_overview: Beauty OS / Barber OS is an all-in-one SaaS platform to modernize management of salons and barbershops, offering booking, queue management, CRM, finance and marketing copilots with premium visual themes. The product provides both internal staff tooling and public booking flows to streamline operations and customer experience.
core_goals: Deliver a B2B SaaS product for salons and barbershops with multi-tenant isolation
Provide a differentiated premium visual experience (Barber Brutalist and Beauty Elegant themes)
Reduce administrative overhead for scheduling, queueing and cash reconciliation
Expose actionable insights and financial KPIs to drive business decisions
Enable public-facing booking and queue entry without requiring client login
Ensure security and scalability using Supabase Auth, RLS and performant frontend stack
Optimize for mobile-first usage and PWA friendliness

features.name: Authentication (Login / Register / Password Recovery)
features.description: Sign-in gateway for business owners and staff, business registration, and password recovery/reset flows using Supabase Auth.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Click "Barbearia" or "Salão de Beleza" on the gateway -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field with invalid credentials -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See authentication error message
Navigate to /register -> Fill business name field -> Fill owner email field -> Fill password field -> Click Register button -> See onboarding / dashboard at /
Navigate to /register -> Fill email field with already-registered email -> Fill required fields -> Click Register button -> See validation error 'email already in use'
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email field -> Click Send reset link -> See confirmation message 'check your email'
Navigate to /update-password?token=... -> Fill new password field -> Click Reset password -> See success message and ability to login

features.name: Dashboard (KPIs & Metrics)
features.description: Primary business dashboard displaying key performance indicators, charts and quick actions for owners and managers.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See KPI cards for revenue, ticket average and occupancy -> Click a KPI card to open detailed report at /insights
Navigate to / -> Click Refresh metrics -> See updated charts and numbers
Navigate to / while unauthenticated -> Be redirected to /login -> See login screen

features.name: Agenda (Appointments & Calendar)
features.description: Internal calendar for staff to view and manage daily/weekly appointments and block unavailable slots.
user_flows: Navigate to /agenda -> Switch to weekly view -> See appointments laid out by staff and time
Navigate to /agenda -> Click Create appointment -> Fill client name -> Select service -> Pick date and time -> Click Save -> See new appointment appear in calendar
Navigate to /agenda -> Click Create appointment -> Pick a time that conflicts with an existing booking -> Click Save -> See error 'Time unavailable / conflict'
Navigate to /agenda -> Click an appointment -> Click Mark as completed -> See appointment status change to completed

features.name: Queue Management (Digital Queue - Owner)
features.description: Owner-facing queue management to add, call and manage customers in a digital queue ('Fila').
user_flows: Navigate to /fila -> Click Add to queue -> Fill customer name -> Select service -> Click Add -> See customer listed in 'Aguardando' queue
Navigate to /fila -> Click Call next -> See top customer move from 'Aguardando' to 'Em Atendimento'
Navigate to /fila -> Click Add to queue without filling required fields -> See validation error 'name required'

features.name: Clients (CRM)
features.description: Client listing, search and profile management to track client history and contact information.
user_flows: Navigate to /clientes -> See list of clients with recent visit info -> Click a client row -> See client profile with visit history
Navigate to /clientes -> Use search input -> Type client name -> See filtered list matching query
Navigate to /clientes -> Click Add client -> Fill name field leaving contact empty -> Click Save -> See validation error 'contact required'

features.name: Finance (Cashflow & Transactions)
features.description: Register sales and services, view cashflow and generate basic financial reports and breakdowns.
user_flows: Navigate to /financeiro -> See daily and monthly cashflow charts -> Click a date to view transactions for that day
Navigate to /financeiro -> Click Add transaction -> Fill amount field -> Select transaction type -> Click Save -> See transaction appear in the ledger
Navigate to /financeiro -> Click Add transaction -> Leave amount empty -> Click Save -> See validation error 'amount required'

features.name: Marketing Copilot
features.description: Assistive marketing actions and campaign generation to engage customers and increase revenue.
user_flows: Navigate to /marketing -> Select campaign template -> Fill target audience filter -> Click Generate campaign -> See generated copy and suggested CTA
Navigate to /marketing -> Click Send campaign -> Confirm send -> See success confirmation 'campaign queued'
Navigate to /marketing -> Click Generate campaign with insufficient data -> See error 'provide business info or customer segment'

features.name: Insights & Reports
features.description: Graphical reports and exportable insights for revenue, occupancy and staff performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /insights -> See charts for revenue and occupancy -> Click timeframe selector -> See charts update for selected timeframe
Navigate to /insights -> Click Export report -> Choose CSV -> Click Download -> See downloaded CSV file
Navigate to /insights -> Select timeframe with no data -> Click View -> See message 'No data available for selected period'

features.name: Public Booking (Customer-facing booking)
features.description: Public booking page where end customers can schedule services without logging in via a business-specific link.
user_flows: Navigate to /book/:slug -> Select service from list -> Pick available date and time -> Fill contact details -> Click Confirm booking -> See booking confirmation and optional share link
Navigate to /book/:slug -> Select a time that was just taken -> Click Confirm booking -> See error 'Selected time no longer available, please choose another slot'

features.name: Queue Join & Status (Customer-facing)
features.description: Public entry to a business' digital queue and a status page to show current position and ETA for the customer.
user_flows: Navigate to /queue/:slug -> Fill customer name -> Click Join queue -> See confirmation with position and link to /queue-status/:id
Navigate to /queue-status/:id -> See current queue position and estimated wait time -> Click Refresh -> See updated position
Navigate to /queue/:slug -> Attempt to join when queue is closed -> Click Join queue -> See error 'Queue closed or not accepting entries'

routes.description: Página de login com seleção de categoria (Barbeiro/Beleza)
Página de registro de novo negócio
Dashboard principal com métricas e KPIs
Gestão financeira e fluxo de caixa
Copiloto de marketing e ações proativas
Entrada na fila digital por clientes
Status da posição na fila para o cliente

features.name: Autenticação
features.description: Login, registro e recuperação de senha
user_interactions: Clicar em "Barbearia" ou "Salão de Beleza" no gateway
